title: Sushi Go Fluids
description: Adds fluid support to some items in Sushi Go Crafting.
body:
# Sushi Go Fluids
Added fluid support to some items in Sushi Go Crafting.
## License
MIT
## Dependencies
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge Mod Loader
- [Sushi Go Crafting](https://modrinth.com/mod/sushigocrafting)
## Recipe Compatibility
### Create
- Filling by Spout\
![Recipe: filling in Create](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Myitian/SushiGoFluids/main/res/compact_Create-filling.png)
- Item Draining\
![Recipe: emptying in Create](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Myitian/SushiGoFluids/main/res/compact_Create-emptying.png)
- Mixing\
![Recipe: mixing in Create](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Myitian/SushiGoFluids/main/res/compact_Create-mixing.png)
### Thermal Expansion
- Centrifugal Separator\
![Recipe: centrifuging in Thermal Expansion](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Myitian/SushiGoFluids/main/res/compact_ThermalExpansion-centrifuge.png)
- Fluid Encapsulator\
![Recipe: bottling in Thermal Expansion](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Myitian/SushiGoFluids/main/res/compact_ThermalExpansion-bottler.png)
### Immersive Engineering
- Industrial Squeezer\
![Recipe: squeezing in Immersive Engineering](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Myitian/SushiGoFluids/main/res/compact_ImmersiveEngineering-squeezer.png)
- Bottling Machine\
![Recipe: bottling in Immersive Engineering](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Myitian/SushiGoFluids/main/res/compact_ImmersiveEngineering-bottling.png)
